title: Recreate Results screen to match reference design (image-13.png)

requirements.summary: Redesign Results.tsx layout to match image-13.png with dark background, header, two-tile timer section, full-width signal banner, 2×2 info grid, and chart thumbnail
acceptanceCriteria: Header displays back arrow, 'Resultado da Análise' title, and 'Análise técnica de candles' subtitle
Two side-by-side tiles at the top: left tile shows TEMPO with countdown timer in large white, right tile shows ENTRAR ÀS with entry time in large cyan/teal
Large full-width signal banner is green for COMPRA or red for VENDA with arrow symbol, trend, confidence, and força badge
2×2 info grid shows Tendência (colored arrow + value), Precisão (value in cyan), Volume (value in purple), Time Frame (value in amber with subtitle)
Chart thumbnail displayed below the grid at full or near-full width with support/resistance dashed lines overlaid
All text labels are in Portuguese (Brazil)
Dark background (#000 or near-black) used throughout
Countdown timer duration matches selected timeframe: M1=60s, M3=180s, M5=300s
Entry time ('ENTRAR ÀS') is computed as current time at page load plus the timeframe duration

file_operations.description: Restructure the entire Results page layout to match image-13.png reference. Replace the existing layout with: (1) A header section displaying a back arrow button (navigate back), title 'Resultado da Análise', and subtitle 'Análise técnica de candles'; (2) A two-tile horizontal row at the top showing TEMPO (countdown timer in large bold white text, e.g., '00:36', with 'restante' label) on the left and ENTRAR ÀS (entry time in large bold cyan/teal, e.g., '20:32', with 'horário de entrada' label) on the right, each tile having a dark background and a clock icon; (3) A large full-width signal banner (green for COMPRA, red for VENDA) displaying the arrow and signal label (e.g., '↗ COMPRA') in large bold white, a line showing 'Tendência: [value] • Confiança: [XX]%', and a centered pill badge 'Força: [forte/média/fraca]'; (4) A 2×2 grid of dark tiles below the banner: top-left tile labeled 'Tendência' with a colored arrow icon and value, top-right tile labeled 'Precisão' with a target icon and value in cyan, bottom-left tile labeled 'Volume' with a bar chart icon and value in purple, bottom-right tile labeled 'Time Frame' with a clock icon, the timeframe value (M1/M3/M5) in amber/orange bold, and a subtitle line (e.g., '1 min/vela'); (5) A large chart thumbnail section below the grid displaying the uploaded chart image at full or near-full width with ChartOverlay component to render support/resistance lines and directional arrow. Use the useCountdownTimer hook to compute and display the remaining time. Compute the entry time as Date.now() plus the timeframe duration in milliseconds. Retrieve the analysis result from sessionStorage key 'currentResult'. Ensure all tiles and the banner have rounded corners, consistent padding, and use a near-black dark background. All text must be in Portuguese. The countdown timer must initialize with the correct duration based on the selected timeframe (M1=60s, M3=180s, M5=300s). Verify the ChartOverlay component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Update chart thumbnail display in Results.tsx to show uploaded chart as large, full-width image below the 2×2 info grid with ChartOverlay for support/resistance lines
acceptanceCriteria: Chart image is displayed full-width (or near full-width) below the 2×2 info grid
ChartOverlay component renders green dashed support lines and red dashed resistance lines on the chart
A directional arrow on the right edge of the chart indicates COMPRA (up) or VENDA (down)
Image is retrieved from sessionStorage key 'chartImage'
No small corner thumbnail is shown; the chart section is a prominent scrollable area

file_operations.description: Replace any previous small corner thumbnail placement with a large, full-width chart thumbnail section positioned below the 2×2 info grid. Retrieve the chart image data URL from sessionStorage under the key 'chartImage'. Render the chart using the ChartOverlay component so that green dashed support lines and red dashed resistance lines are drawn on top of the chart. Pass the signal direction ('COMPRA' or 'VENDA') to ChartOverlay to display a directional arrow on the right edge of the chart (upward arrow for COMPRA, downward arrow for VENDA). Ensure the chart section is full-width or near-full-width and occupies a prominent scrollable area matching the reference design in image-13.png. Remove any previous logic that displayed the chart as a small thumbnail in a corner. Verify the ChartOverlay component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Update 2×2 info grid tiles in Results.tsx to display colored arrow icon for Tendência, cyan value for Precisão, purple value for Volume, and amber value with subtitle for Time Frame
acceptanceCriteria: Tendência tile shows colored arrow (green ↗ for ALTA, red ↘ for BAIXA) inline with the value
Precisão tile value is rendered in cyan/teal
Volume tile value is rendered in purple
Time Frame tile value is rendered in amber/orange bold with subtitle '1 min/vela', '3 min/vela', or '5 min/vela' matching the selected timeframe
All tile labels are in Portuguese

file_operations.description: Update the 2×2 info grid tiles to match the visual style shown in image-13.png. In the Tendência tile (top-left), display a colored arrow icon (green upward arrow ↗ for ALTA, red downward arrow ↘ for BAIXA) inline with the trend value. Apply green text color for ALTA and red text color for BAIXA. In the Precisão tile (top-right), render the precision value (percentage or label) in cyan/teal text. In the Volume tile (bottom-left), render the volume value in purple text. In the Time Frame tile (bottom-right), render the timeframe value (M1, M3, M5) in amber/orange bold text and include a subtitle line below it: '1 min/vela' for M1, '3 min/vela' for M3, '5 min/vela' for M5. Ensure all tile labels ('Tendência', 'Precisão', 'Volume', 'Time Frame') are displayed in Portuguese and use consistent dark tile backgrounds with rounded corners and padding.

requirements.summary: Update signal banner in Results.tsx to display arrow and signal label, trend/confidence line, and centered força badge inline within the full-width green or red banner
acceptanceCriteria: Signal banner is full-width, green for COMPRA, red for VENDA
First line: arrow symbol + signal label in large bold white
Second line: 'Tendência: [value] • Confiança: [XX]%'
Third line: centered 'Força: [forte/média/fraca]' badge
Banner has generous vertical padding giving it prominent visual weight

file_operations.description: Update the signal banner to display all information inline within a single full-width banner element. The banner background color must be green for COMPRA and red for VENDA. Inside the banner, display: (1) A first line showing the arrow symbol and signal label (e.g., '↗ COMPRA' or '↙ VENDA') in large bold white text; (2) A second line showing 'Tendência: [value] • Confiança: [XX]%' (e.g., 'Tendência: ALTA • Confiança: 95%'); (3) A third line showing a centered pill badge with 'Força: [forte/média/fraca]' (e.g., 'Força: forte'). Apply generous vertical padding to the banner to give it prominent visual weight matching the reference design in image-13.png. Ensure all text is in Portuguese and the banner spans the full width of the screen.
